//: Shared base for packages that `extends` it (session-tools-core, pi-agent-server, session-mcp-server). Emit-neutral on purpose: module/moduleResolution/noEmit/allowImportingTsExtensions/declaration are left to each package so both typecheck (noEmit) and build (declaration) configs can extend the same base. Mirrors the project-standard strict options used by the self-contained root/shared tsconfigs.
